title: Plans with conditions
subtitle: Plan around real constraints.
overview: Use si, cuando, and porque to make practical plans.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Si llueve, nos quedamos en casa.
If it rains, we stay home.
When I finish, I will call you.
Si no hay billetes, vamos en autobús.
If there are no tickets, we go by bus.

items.es: Si tengo tiempo, voy a comprar comida después del trabajo.
items.en: If I have time, I am going to buy food after work.

items.es: Cuando llegue Ana, vamos a cenar.
items.en: When Ana arrives, we are going to eat dinner.

items.es: Si el hotel es demasiado caro, buscaremos otro.
items.en: If the hotel is too expensive, we will look for another one.

items.es: Si no puedo ir, te aviso.
items.en: If I cannot go, I will let you know.

items.es: Vamos a salir temprano porque hay mucho tráfico.
items.en: We are going to leave early because there is a lot of traffic.
